name: forge
description: Vibe-coded plans go in. Only what survives ships. An agentic shipping loop for Claude Code, built on the Ralph Loop.

plugins.name: forge
plugins.description: Drift-protected agentic shipping. Devil's Advocate before every plan, mandatory 10% Delete Rule, drift checks every five features. Two modes: Founder validation (SCOUT → INTERROGATE → SYNTHESIZE → GRADUATE) and PM shipping (HARVEST → SHAPE → BUILD → SHIP). 13 commands, 9 agents, 10 skills, 13 state-file templates.
